comments: Recording starts part way through first track.

Tommy declines to send a signed photo to a listener as 'he can’t stand looking at himself!' Then mentions he saw a picture of himself in the Daily Mirror recently where he looked like 'a bloomin’ walrus!'
Repeat of ZZ Top’s performance at MOR 1983 finishes the show.
Tony Wilson is getting married the next day, Tommy is best man!
Tommy discloses he’s off for a month after tonight, travelling to Antarctica (!) for 2 weeks, then Ibiza for 2 weeks. Andy Batten-Foster will be covering the FRS for the next 4 shows.

sessions.details: 1. Repeat broadcast of session first tx 13 April 1984. The session is available on the Power Games - The Anthology (2002, 2xCD, Sanctuary)

track_listing.track: In The Eye Of My Gun
747 (Strangers In The Night) (LP – Wheels Of Steel)
ZZ Top Live At Monsters Of Rock Castle Donington 1983
